summary: Frontend-only testing of Smile N Shine Clinic landing page. All major sections, interactions, and flows tested on desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (390x844).

ui_bugs.issue: Duplicate 'Call Now' button appears in mobile menu overlay - one from header nav area and one standalone below Book Appointment button
Section heading 'Take a Virtual Tour' text bleeds through the lightbox backdrop overlay - overlay background appears semi-transparent, the section title text is visible behind the lightbox modal

issues: Masonry grid layout at bottom of gallery section shows only 1 column with 2 images - may be a CSS columns issue for the last items

action_items: Fix lightbox backdrop overlay - increase opacity or use a fully opaque backdrop to prevent section heading text from showing through
Review mobile menu to remove duplicate 'Call Now' button
Verify gallery masonry CSS columns fill properly on all screen sizes
critical_code_review_comments: Gallery.jsx lightbox backdrop likely needs backdrop-filter or higher opacity background to avoid content bleed-through
Header.jsx mobile menu may be rendering both the header CTAs and a separate floating call button in the same overlay
context_for_next_testing_agent: All critical flows working: Hero, Trust Badges, About, Services, Doctor, Appointment (form validation + confirmation dialog), Why Choose Us, Testimonials carousel, Health Tips, Gallery with lightbox, Contact with Google Maps, Footer with 4 columns + social links. Sticky header + floating WhatsApp all confirmed. Two minor UI bugs: (1) lightbox text bleed-through, (2) duplicate Call Now in mobile menu.
passed_tests: Page loads successfully with all sections
Sticky header with logo, nav, Call Now and Book Appointment buttons
Hero: 'Quality Healthcare for Your Family' headline, CTA buttons
Appointment form validation (shows errors for empty required fields)
Appointment form full submission with confirmation dialog
Contact section: address, phone, email, WhatsApp, working hours, Google Maps iframe
Footer: 4 columns, brand info, Quick Links, Services, Contact, social links
Mobile: hamburger menu opens with nav links and CTA buttons
All data-testid attributes verified: sticky-header, floating-whatsapp-btn, appointment-submit-btn, testimonial-prev-btn, testimonial-next-btn, lightbox-close-btn
